column1: # In the /PF submenu, descending into /O opens the Options sub-sub-menu.
# /H prompts for a header string, /F for a footer. Both use |-split
# L|C|R text for three-part alignment. /Q returns to the /PF menu.
# /G then writes the range with the header/footer surrounding it.
# /Q at Options level returns to the /PF submenu (not READY).
